Class WindowList

java.lang.Object
io.github.sentinel.webdrivers.WindowList
public class WindowList extends Object
Keeps track of all windows a driver has open and which one the user is currently on.
Author:
Sentinel Framework

    Field

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    WindowList(org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver driver)
    When a WindowList is created, you must pass it a reference to the driver that created it.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private int
    addNewWindows()
    Search the driver for all windows and add any that don't exist.
    protected void
    clear()
    Empty out the list of windows.
    protected void
    closeCurrentWindow()
    Closes the current window and moves the driver to the previous window.
    protected boolean
    doesWindowExist(String title)
    Checks if a window of the passed title exists
    private String
    getHandleFromTitle(String title, boolean contains)
    Search the available window handles to find a window with the expected title.
    protected void
    goToLastWindow()
    Moves the driver to the last window in our list, which is presumably the most recent one created.
    protected void
    goToNewWindow()
    Wait for a new window to be added, and moves the driver to the last window added.
    protected void
    goToNextWindow()
    Moves the driver to the next window.
    protected void
    goToPreviousWindow()
    Moves the driver to the previous window.
    protected void
    goToTitledWindow(String title)
    Switches to the window whose title matches the string passed
    protected void
    goToTitledWindowThatContains(String titleContains)
    Switches to the window whose title contains the string passed
    private void
    markCurrentWindow()
    Track the current window.
    private int
    pruneClosedWindows()
    If any windows have been closed, remove them from our list.
    private void
    refreshWindows()
    Checks for added or removed windows so the list is up-to-date.
    private String
    searchForWindowByTitleContains(String title)
    Searches through all open windows to find one with a title that contains the given string.
    private String
    searchForWindowByTitleEquals(String title)
    Searches through all open windows to find one with a title that equals the given string.

  • Field Details

    • windowHandles

      private List<String> windowHandles

    • currentWindow

      private int currentWindow

    • driver

      private org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver driver

  • Constructor Details

    • WindowList

      public WindowList(org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver driver)
      When a WindowList is created, you must pass it a reference to the driver that created it. This driver is stored and the list of windows is created and then maintained for it. Since this object is destroyed when the driver is destroyed, it should never have a stale reference to a driver.
      Parameters:
      driver - WebDriver the containing driver object that is related to this driver object

  • Method Details

    • refreshWindows

      private void refreshWindows()
      Checks for added or removed windows so the list is up-to-date.

    • addNewWindows

      private int addNewWindows()
      Search the driver for all windows and add any that don't exist.
      Returns:
      int Returns the number of added windows

    • markCurrentWindow

      private void markCurrentWindow()
      Track the current window.

    • pruneClosedWindows

      private int pruneClosedWindows()
      If any windows have been closed, remove them from our list.
      Returns:
      int Returns the number of pruned windows

    • getHandleFromTitle

      private String getHandleFromTitle(String title, boolean contains)
      Search the available window handles to find a window with the expected title. Searches until default timeout.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the window to get the handle of
      Returns:
      the handle of the window that has the title expected

    • searchForWindowByTitleContains

      private String searchForWindowByTitleContains(String title)
      Searches through all open windows to find one with a title that contains the given string.
      Parameters:
      title - String the title to search for in the windows.
      Returns:
      String the handle of the window with the given string in the title. Null if no window found with a matching title.

    • searchForWindowByTitleEquals

      private String searchForWindowByTitleEquals(String title)
      Searches through all open windows to find one with a title that equals the given string.
      Parameters:
      title - String the title to search for in the windows.
      Returns:
      String the handle of the window with the given string in the title. Null if no window found with a matching title.

    • goToNewWindow

      protected void goToNewWindow()
      Wait for a new window to be added, and moves the driver to the last window added.

    • closeCurrentWindow

      protected void closeCurrentWindow()
      Closes the current window and moves the driver to the previous window. If no previous window exists, we call close to clean up.

    • goToNextWindow

      protected void goToNextWindow()
      Moves the driver to the next window.

    • goToPreviousWindow

      protected void goToPreviousWindow()
      Moves the driver to the previous window.

    • goToLastWindow

      protected void goToLastWindow()
      Moves the driver to the last window in our list, which is presumably the most recent one created.

    • goToTitledWindow

      protected void goToTitledWindow(String title)
      Switches to the window whose title matches the string passed
      Parameters:
      title - String the title of the window to go to

    • goToTitledWindowThatContains

      protected void goToTitledWindowThatContains(String titleContains)
      Switches to the window whose title contains the string passed
      Parameters:
      titleContains - String the partial title window to search for and switch to

    • clear

      protected void clear()
      Empty out the list of windows.

    • doesWindowExist

      protected boolean doesWindowExist(String title)
      Checks if a window of the passed title exists
      Parameters:
      title - String the title of the window to check for
      Returns:
      true if a window is found that has the title passed as the string
